title: ORM 2026: Prisma vs Drizzle vs SQLAlchemy
meta_description: Cut ORM cold-start latency 71% and save $1,200/month by dropping Prisma for Drizzle + raw SQL on Postgres 16 and Node 22. Migration safety over 2G, RAM under 512 MB, and type safety without runtime overhead.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams waste weeks debugging ORM migrations over 2G in rural clinics.

Prisma 6.5 and SQLAlchemy 2.0 both choked.

Drizzle 0.
